name: White Cake (Diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cake flour, baking powder, and salt in a sifter, then sift into a medium-sized bowl. Set aside.
2. Beat shortening, sorbitol, vanilla, and water together until creamy.
3. Add the flour mixture and milk alternately, beating well after each addition.
4. Fold in the stiffly beaten egg whites.
5. Grease an 8-inch cake pan.
6. Line the pan with waxed paper and grease it again; then lightly flour the pan.
7. Spread the batter into the greased, lined, and floured cake pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
9. Allow to cool. Turn over onto a board or plate and remove the waxed paper.
Yield: 10 servings
Exchange: 1 serving = 1 starch, 1 fat calories, 1 carbohydrate, 12 origin calories
Diabetic Cakes, Pies and Other Scrumptious Desserts
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
